raw_consumer_statement: credit card account ending XXXX at citi bank was fraudulently used about a year ago. we called and reported it and canceled account. The same account was then charged again and again. long story short, they removed all but some fees after a year and hundreds of hours on the phone. Still to date they keep on promising but do not take care of. I have never seen such incomitance in a company. I need any charges removed from closed account and considering suing citibank for all the anguish and time spent on this matter. will explain in better detail if needed with hundreds of documented calls
